problem id: 872c96f1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHL(4)

examples:
  01111101 -> 11010000
  11100100 -> 01000000
  01001101 -> 10010000
  00011011 -> 00110000
  00101000 -> 00000000
  11110011 -> 00100000
  00001011 -> 00010000
  00100000 -> 00000000
  00111001 -> 00010000
  10100100 -> 01000000

query: 10101001
predicted answer: 00010000
